events.title: Buick City Northend industrial buildings presence interval
events.summary: Industrial buildings are represented as present during a sourced interval and gone only where source evidence supports disappearance.

source.rights_note: Link to public source; do not republish restricted source text.

confidence.label: medium
confidence.reason: Industrial site source supports a major demolition milestone, but exact building-level dates require more records.

events.public_caveat: Presence interval is source-bounded and not an exact construction or demolition date.

events.title: Water service line work intervention record
events.summary: A public infrastructure intervention can be tracked as promised, funded, work, and outcome events before causal claims are made.

source.rights_note: Use public project and map links; household-level records stay private.

confidence.label: low
confidence.reason: Program-level source exists, but stage, geography, and outcome details require record-level review.

events.public_caveat: Do not expose address-level service-line records in public read models.

events.title: Monthly corridor crash aggregate
events.summary: Street-safety records begin as reviewed aggregates before forecasts or neural road-risk layers are shown.

source.rights_note: Public display must stay aggregate and source-labeled.

confidence.label: unknown
confidence.reason: Fixture record proves shape only; no official aggregate value is asserted.

events.public_caveat: Aggregate fixture has no public claim until source values are imported and reviewed.

events.title: Historical article candidate event
events.summary: Historical newspapers can create event candidates linked to place and time without republishing full article text.

source.rights_note: Store archive links and short review summaries; do not republish full copyrighted article text.

confidence.label: low
confidence.reason: Fixture proves event shape only; article, place, and date need source review.

events.public_caveat: Historical event candidates require source and rights review before publication.

events.title: Ward-level resource access metric
events.summary: Metrics attach measured civic context to a place/time period with source and uncertainty notes.

source.rights_note: Use aggregate public data with measure definitions and margin/caveat cards.

confidence.label: unknown
confidence.reason: Fixture has no numeric value; later metrics must carry definitions and uncertainty.

events.public_caveat: Aggregate metric fixtures are not rankings and require plain-language caveats.

events.title: Source freshness inventory update
events.summary: Source update events record when an atlas source was checked and what freshness limits were found.

source.rights_note: Record source-card freshness metadata without copying restricted data.

confidence.label: medium
confidence.reason: Freshness event documents an atlas review action, not a source data claim.

events.public_caveat: Freshness events say when the atlas checked a source, not when the source last changed.

events.title: Historical place-link candidate
events.summary: A model-assisted historical place link remains a reviewable proposal until a reviewer promotes it.

source.rights_note: Use source link and short review notes only.

confidence.label: low
confidence.reason: Candidate link was generated from historical text and needs address/geocoder review.

events.public_caveat: Model proposal cannot become a public place fact without review.
